%pyspark
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plot_df = (
    df.withColumn("S_2", F.to_date(F.col("S_2")))
      .groupBy("S_2", "target")
      .count()
      .orderBy("S_2", "target")
      .toPandas()
)

# split by target
plot_0 = plot_df[plot_df["target"] == 0]
plot_1 = plot_df[plot_df["target"] == 1]

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 5))
plt.plot(plot_0["S_2"], plot_0["count"], label="target = 0")
plt.plot(plot_1["S_2"], plot_1["count"], label="target = 1")

plt.title("Daily Count by Target over Time")
plt.xlabel("S_2")
plt.ylabel("Count")
plt.legend()
plt.xticks(rotation=45)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

%pyspark
# Statements per customer (distribution + quick quantiles)
records_per_customer = (
    df.groupBy('customer_ID')
      .agg(F.count('*').alias('n_records'))
)

records_per_customer.groupBy('n_records') \
    .agg(F.count('*').alias('n_customers')) \
    .orderBy('n_records') \
    .show(20, truncate=False)

q25, q50, q75, q95 = records_per_customer.approxQuantile('n_records', [0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.95], 0.01)
print(f"n_records quantiles -> p25={q25}, p50={q50}, p75={q75}, p95={q95}")

%pyspark
# ========================================
# Missing Rate Analysis (cluster-friendly)
# ========================================

# One full pass for row count
n_rows = df.count()

num_missing_exprs = [
    (F.sum(F.when(F.col(c).isNull() | F.isnan(c), 1).otherwise(0)) / F.lit(n_rows)).alias(c)
    for c in num_cols
]

cat_missing_exprs = [
    (F.sum(F.when(F.col(c).isNull(), 1).otherwise(0)) / F.lit(n_rows)).alias(c)
    for c in cat_cols
]

missing_row = df.select(num_missing_exprs + cat_missing_exprs).collect()[0]

missing_data = [(c, float(missing_row[c])) for c in (num_cols + cat_cols)]
missing_pd = pandas.DataFrame(missing_data, columns=['feature', 'missing_rate']) \
    .sort_values('missing_rate', ascending=False) \
    .reset_index(drop=True)

print('=== Top 20 features by missing rate ===')
print(missing_pd.head(20).to_string(index=False))
print(f"\nFeatures with >10% missing: {(missing_pd['missing_rate'] > 0.1).sum()}")
print(f"Features with 0% missing: {(missing_pd['missing_rate'] == 0).sum()}")

# Optional drop list for later FE
high_missing_cols = missing_pd[missing_pd['missing_rate'] > 0.3]['feature'].tolist()
print(f"\nFeatures with >30% missing (consider dropping): {len(high_missing_cols)}")
print(high_missing_cols)

%pyspark
# ========================================
# EDA: Key Feature Distributions (sampled)
# ========================================

# Last record per customer (for label-aligned distribution)
last_record = (
    df.withColumn(
        'row_num',
        F.row_number().over(Window.partitionBy('customer_ID').orderBy(F.col('S_2').desc()))
    )
    .filter(F.col('row_num') == 1)
    .drop('row_num')
)

sample_cols = ['P_2', 'S_3', 'R_1', 'B_1', 'D_39', 'target']
# Keep plotting stable on weak clusters: sample + row cap
plot_pd = (
    last_record.select(sample_cols)
    .sample(False, 0.08, seed=42)
    .limit(120000)
    .toPandas()
)

print(f"Plot sample rows: {len(plot_pd):,}")

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(16, 10))
for i, feat in enumerate(['P_2', 'S_3', 'R_1', 'B_1', 'D_39']):
    ax = axes[i // 3][i % 3]
    for t, color, label in [(0, '#2196F3', 'Non-default'), (1, '#F44336', 'Default')]:
        subset = plot_pd.loc[plot_pd['target'] == t, feat].dropna()
        ax.hist(subset, bins=40, alpha=0.5, color=color, label=label, density=True)
    ax.set_title(f'{feat} by target')
    ax.legend()

# 6th plot: default rate by #records (sampled customer set)
ax = axes[1][2]
rec_counts = (
    df.groupBy('customer_ID')
      .agg(F.count('*').alias('n_records'), F.max('target').alias('target'))
      .sample(False, 0.2, seed=42)
      .toPandas()
)
rec_curve = rec_counts.groupby('n_records', as_index=False)['target'].mean().sort_values('n_records')
ax.plot(rec_curve['n_records'], rec_curve['target'], marker='o')
ax.set_title('Default rate by # statements (sampled)')
ax.set_ylabel('Default rate')
ax.set_xlabel('# statements')

plt.tight_layout()
# plt.savefig('/tmp/eda_distributions.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
# print('Saved: /tmp/eda_distributions.png')

%pyspark
# ========================================
# EDA: Missing Rate vs Default
# ========================================
# Does having more missing values correlate with default?

num_features_for_missing = num_cols[:50]  # use a subset to save memory

missing_per_customer = (
    df.groupBy("customer_ID")
    .agg(
        *[F.avg(F.when(F.col(c).isNull() | F.isnan(c), 1.0).otherwise(0.0)).alias(f"miss_{c}")
          for c in num_features_for_missing],
        F.last("target").alias("target")
    )
)

# Calculate average missing rate across all features per customer
miss_cols = [f"miss_{c}" for c in num_features_for_missing]
avg_expr = sum([F.col(c) for c in miss_cols]) / len(miss_cols)
missing_per_customer = missing_per_customer.withColumn("avg_missing", avg_expr)

plot_missing = missing_per_customer.select("avg_missing", "target").toPandas()

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 5))
for t, color, label in [(0, '#2196F3', 'Non-default'), (1, '#F44336', 'Default')]:
    subset = plot_missing[plot_missing['target'] == t]['avg_missing']
    ax.hist(subset, bins=50, alpha=0.5, color=color, label=label, density=True)
ax.set_title('Average Missing Rate per Customer by Target')
ax.set_xlabel('Average Missing Rate')
ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/eda_missing_vs_target.png', dpi=150)
plt.show()

%md
# 4. Feature Engineering: Time-Series Aggregation

%pyspark
# 1) Build sequence endpoints (first/last records) and customer time features

w_asc = Window.partitionBy('customer_ID').orderBy(F.col('S_2').asc())
w_desc = Window.partitionBy('customer_ID').orderBy(F.col('S_2').desc())

first_df = (
    df.withColumn('rn', F.row_number().over(w_asc))
      .filter(F.col('rn') == 1)
      .drop('rn')
)

last_df = (
    df.withColumn('rn', F.row_number().over(w_desc))
      .filter(F.col('rn') == 1)
      .drop('rn')
)

customer_time_df = (
    df.groupBy('customer_ID')
      .agg(
          F.count('*').alias('statement_count'),
          F.min('S_2').alias('first_statement_date'),
          F.max('S_2').alias('last_statement_date')
      )
      .withColumn('active_days', F.datediff(F.col('last_statement_date'), F.col('first_statement_date')))
      .withColumn('avg_gap_days', F.when(F.col('statement_count') > 1, F.col('active_days') / (F.col('statement_count') - 1)).otherwise(F.lit(0.0)))
)

print('Built first_df / last_df / customer_time_df')
print('first_df rows:', first_df.count())
print('last_df rows:', last_df.count())

%pyspark

%pyspark
# 2) Rich numeric aggregation (all numeric columns)
# Base stats + percentile + skewness
numeric_agg_exprs = []
for c in num_cols:
    numeric_agg_exprs.extend([
        F.mean(c).alias(f'{c}_mean'),
        F.stddev(c).alias(f'{c}_std'),
        F.min(c).alias(f'{c}_min'),
        F.max(c).alias(f'{c}_max'),
        # F.expr(f'percentile_approx({c}, array(0.25, 0.5, 0.75))').alias(f'{c}_pcts'),
        F.expr(f'percentile_approx({c}, 0.25, 10000)').alias(f'{c}_p25'),
        F.expr(f'percentile_approx({c}, 0.50, 10000)').alias(f'{c}_p50'),
        F.expr(f'percentile_approx({c}, 0.75, 10000)').alias(f'{c}_p75'),
        F.skewness(c).alias(f'{c}_skew')
    ])

numeric_stats_df = df.groupBy('customer_ID').agg(*numeric_agg_exprs)
print('numeric_stats_df columns:', len(numeric_stats_df.columns))

%pyspark
# 3) Endpoint features: first/last values + temporal deltas for numeric columns
first_num_df = first_df.select(['customer_ID'] + [F.col(c).alias(f'{c}_first') for c in num_cols])
last_num_df = last_df.select(['customer_ID'] + [F.col(c).alias(f'{c}_last') for c in num_cols])

endpoint_num_df = first_num_df.join(last_num_df, on='customer_ID', how='inner')

# Add delta and abs-delta for each numeric column
delta_exprs = [F.col('customer_ID')]
for c in num_cols:
    first_c = F.col(f'{c}_first')
    last_c = F.col(f'{c}_last')
    delta_exprs.extend([
        first_c,
        last_c,
        (last_c - first_c).alias(f'{c}_delta'),
        F.abs(last_c - first_c).alias(f'{c}_abs_delta')
    ])

endpoint_num_df = endpoint_num_df.select(*delta_exprs)
print('endpoint_num_df columns:', len(endpoint_num_df.columns))

%pyspark
# 4) Categorical dynamics + missingness profile
# categorical first/last + change flag + nunique
first_cat_df = first_df.select(['customer_ID'] + [F.col(c).alias(f'{c}_first') for c in cat_cols])
last_cat_df = last_df.select(['customer_ID'] + [F.col(c).alias(f'{c}_last') for c in cat_cols])
cat_nunique_df = df.groupBy('customer_ID').agg(*[F.countDistinct(c).alias(f'{c}_nunique') for c in cat_cols])

cat_dyn_df = first_cat_df.join(last_cat_df, on='customer_ID', how='inner').join(cat_nunique_df, on='customer_ID', how='left')

for c in cat_cols:
    cat_dyn_df = cat_dyn_df.withColumn(
        f'{c}_changed',
        F.when(F.col(f'{c}_first').isNull() | F.col(f'{c}_last').isNull(), F.lit(None))
         .otherwise((F.col(f'{c}_first') != F.col(f'{c}_last')).cast('int'))
    )

# numeric missingness profile (per customer)
miss_exprs = [
    F.avg(F.when(F.col(c).isNull() | F.isnan(c), 1.0).otherwise(0.0)).alias(f'{c}_miss_rate')
    for c in num_cols
]
missing_profile_df = df.groupBy('customer_ID').agg(*miss_exprs)
print('cat_dyn_df columns:', len(cat_dyn_df.columns))
print('missing_profile_df columns:', len(missing_profile_df.columns))

%pyspark
# 5) Assemble accuracy-first feature table and join target
accuracy_feature_df = (
    numeric_stats_df
    .join(endpoint_num_df, on='customer_ID', how='left')
    .join(cat_dyn_df, on='customer_ID', how='left')
    .join(missing_profile_df, on='customer_ID', how='left')
    .join(customer_time_df, on='customer_ID', how='left')
)

target_df_v2 = df.groupBy('customer_ID').agg(F.max('target').alias('target'))
accuracy_final_df = accuracy_feature_df.join(target_df_v2, on='customer_ID', how='inner')

accuracy_final_df.createOrReplaceTempView('accuracy_final_df_sql')

print('accuracy_final_df ready')
print('Rows:', accuracy_final_df.count())
print('Columns:', len(accuracy_final_df.columns))
accuracy_final_df.select('customer_ID', 'target', 'statement_count', 'active_days').show(3, truncate=False)

## Evaluate Matrix defination

%pyspark

def performance(pred, name="model", show_cm=False):
    auc = BinaryClassificationEvaluator(
        labelCol="target",
        rawPredictionCol="rawPrediction",
        metricName="areaUnderROC"
    ).evaluate(pred)

    accuracy = MulticlassClassificationEvaluator(
        labelCol="target",
        predictionCol="prediction",
        metricName="accuracy"
    ).evaluate(pred)

    precision = MulticlassClassificationEvaluator(
        labelCol="target",
        predictionCol="prediction",
        metricName="weightedPrecision"
    ).evaluate(pred)

    recall = MulticlassClassificationEvaluator(
        labelCol="target",
        predictionCol="prediction",
        metricName="weightedRecall"
    ).evaluate(pred)

    print(f"\n[{name}]")
    print(f"AUC       = {auc:.4f}")
    print(f"Accuracy  = {accuracy:.4f}")
    print(f"Precision = {precision:.4f}")
    print(f"Recall    = {recall:.4f}")

    if show_cm:
        pred.groupBy("target", "prediction").count().show()

    return {
        "auc": float(auc),
        "accuracy": float(accuracy),
        "precision": float(precision),
        "recall": float(recall)
    }

dt = SparkDT(

    .addGrid(dt.minInstancesPerNode, [100, 300, 50 ,200])

)

)

    dt_rows.append({
        "idx": i,
        "maxDepth": pm[dt.maxDepth],
        "minInstancesPerNode": pm[dt.minInstancesPerNode],
        "cv_auc": float(metric)
    })

%pyspark

import numpy as np

pred_pd = gbt_pred.select("target", "probability").toPandas()
pred_pd["prob_1"] = pred_pd["probability"].apply(lambda x: float(x[1]))

thresholds = [0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6]

print(f"{'Threshold':<10} | {'Prec(C1)':<10} | {'Rec(C1)':<10} | {'FPR':<10} | {'Weighted Prec (Matches Performance)':<25}")
print("-" * 85)

for t in thresholds:
    pred_label = (pred_pd["prob_1"] > t).astype(int)
    y = pred_pd["target"]

    TP = np.sum((y == 1) & (pred_label == 1))
    TN = np.sum((y == 0) & (pred_label == 0))
    FP = np.sum((y == 0) & (pred_label == 1))
    FN = np.sum((y == 1) & (pred_label == 0))

    precision_1 = TP / (TP + FP) if (TP + FP) > 0 else 0
    recall_1 = TP / (TP + FN) if (TP + FN) > 0 else 0
    fpr = FP / (FP + TN) if (FP + TN) > 0 else 0

    precision_0 = TN / (TN + FN) if (TN + FN) > 0 else 0
    recall_0 = TN / (TN + FP) if (TN + FP) > 0 else 0

    total = len(y)
    n1 = np.sum(y == 1)
    n0 = np.sum(y == 0)
    weighted_precision = (precision_1 * n1 + precision_0 * n0) / total

    print(f"t={t:.2f}      | {precision_1:.4f}   | {recall_1:.4f}   | {fpr:.4f}   | {weighted_precision:.4f}")

plt.xlabel("Importance")
plt.title("Top 20 Feature Importances - Spark GBT")

plt.show()
